slides.title: Day 4 — Financial Entrepreneurship
slides.body:
You have identity (Day 1), industry context (Day 2), and customer insight (Day 3).

Today: choose how you will BUILD — and draft your operating model.
discussionQuestions: What kind of entrepreneur do you want to become?

slides.title: Advisor vs Entrepreneur
slides.body:
Advisor mindset: execute someone else's system.
Entrepreneur mindset: design your own venture system.

SPIKE trains financial entrepreneurs — owners of their blueprint.
discussionQuestions: Where have you been an advisor vs entrepreneur in your life?

slides.title: Agency Builder Path
slides.body:
Build a team · Recruit · Develop leaders · Scale organization.
Canvas engines: talent, leadership, recruitment, culture.
discussionQuestions: What excites you about building a team?

slides.title: Specialist Consultant Path
slides.body:
Build deep expertise · Premium practice · Niche authority.
Canvas engines: expertise, client experience, reputation.
discussionQuestions: What niche could you own in 3 years?

slides.title: Deck 01 Close
slides.body: Deck 02 introduces the Financial Entrepreneurship Canvas.
discussionQuestions: Which path will you explore first today?
